seo.title: Fence Installation Review Management Software | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for your fence company. Route upset customers to private feedback before it hits Google. Free forever, no credit card required.

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Fence Installation
hero.subheading: A straight fence feels like the default once dogs stop testing it. ReviewFlo asks right after walk-through when the line still looks sharp.

howItWorks.sectionHeading: How ReviewFlo Works for Fence Installers

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after final walk-through
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link when the gate latches clean.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they send feedback to you privately.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star clients go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

items.heading: Ask at completion
items.body: Send when they test the latch and like the sight lines.

items.heading: Private first for property line issues
items.body: Disputes stay direct before stars fall.
